<?php namespace Watson\Sitemap; use Illuminate\Support\ServiceProvider; class SitemapServiceProvider extends ServiceProvider { /** * Indicates if loading of the provider is deferred. * * @var bool */ protected $defer = false; /** * Register the service provider. * * @return void */ public function register() { $this->app->bind('sitemap', 'Watson\Sitemap\Sitemap'); $this->mergeConfigFrom( __DIR__.'/../../config/config.php', 'sitemap' ); } /** * Bootstrap the application events. * * @return void */ public function boot() { $this->loadViewsFrom(__DIR__.'/../../views', 'sitemap'); $this->publishes([ __DIR__.'/../../config/config.php' => config_path('sitemap.php'), ], 'config'); $this->publishes([ __DIR__.'/../../views' => base_path('resources/views/vendor/sitemap'), ], 'views'); } /** * Get the services provided by the provider. * * @return array */ public function provides() { return ['sitemap']; } }
